name: Ambushed by Thoroughbred
description:
It is almost the end of UC 0079. Having been pushed off of Earth by the Earth Federation, the Principality of Zeon consolidates what's left of its forces for the oncoming assault on Solomon. In preparation for the assault, the Thoroughbred is sent to disrupt the Zeon supply line between Solomon and Granada. To do this, it is given two experimental Gundams, Unit 4 and Unit 5.

The mission was simple. Your squad and a resupply fleet were to leave Granada to deliver essential supplies to Solomon.

(Based on the Gundam Side Story "Space, at the End of a Flash".)

(Made for a guy who wanted to be a Zeon pilot fighting the two Gundam's.)
creator: TerminusUnica
